_comment: This file is generated. Please edit .homeycompose/app.json instead.

description.en: Power your home when energy is cheapest and greenest.

titleFormatted.en: The balance of [[device]] drops below £[[amount]]

hint.en: Triggers when your Octopus account balance falls below the amount.

titleFormatted.en: The balance of [[device]] changed

hint.en: Triggers when your Octopus account balance changes.

titleFormatted.en: Cost (24h) of [[device]] rises above £[[amount]]

hint.en: Triggers when the last-24h energy cost exceeds your budget.

title.en: A planned smart-charge dispatch was cancelled

hint.en: Triggers when a previously planned Intelligent Octopus Go dispatch is removed from the plan (confirmed by a successful update, never from a failed poll).

title.en: A planned smart-charge dispatch was rescheduled

hint.en: Triggers when a future Intelligent Octopus Go dispatch window is rescheduled (its end time or type changed). A moved start time is reported as a cancellation plus a new dispatch.
Triggers when an Intelligent Octopus Go smart-charge dispatch finishes (from completed history).
Triggers when an Intelligent Octopus Go smart-charge dispatch finishes.
Triggers when Intelligent Octopus Go begins a planned smart-charge dispatch.

title.en: A Free Electricity (Power Up) session ended

hint.en: Triggers when an Octopus Power Up free-electricity session finishes.

title.en: A Free Electricity (Power Up) session started

hint.en: Triggers when an Octopus Power Up free-electricity session begins.
Triggers once when a new Octopus Saving Session appears for your account.
Triggers when an Octopus Saving Session finishes.
Triggers when an Octopus Saving Session begins — reduce usage to earn OctoPoints.

title.en: A Saving Session is starting soon

titleFormatted.en: A Saving Session starts within [[lead]] minutes

hint.en: Triggers when a Saving Session is due to start within the lead time you set.

titleFormatted.en: The standing charge of [[device]] changed

hint.en: Triggers when your tariff's daily standing charge changes.

titleFormatted.en: The tariff of [[device]] changed

hint.en: Triggers when the active tariff on a meter changes (e.g. a fixed deal ends and you move to standard variable).

titleFormatted.en: Usage (24h) of [[device]] rises above [[amount]] kWh

hint.en: Triggers when the last-24h energy usage exceeds the amount.
Triggers each half hour when the electricity unit rate changes.

titleFormatted.en: The unit rate drops below [[price]] p/kWh

hint.en: Triggers when a new half-hourly unit rate is below your threshold.
Triggers when the unit rate drops below zero — Octopus is paying you to use energy.
Triggers when the price level changes between plunge, cheap, normal and expensive.

titleFormatted.en: Now is the cheapest half-hour in the next [[hours]] h

hint.en: Triggers when the current half-hour is the cheapest within the look-ahead window.
Triggers when the current half-hour enters your cheapest smart-charge plan.
Triggers when the current half-hour leaves your cheapest smart-charge plan.

titleFormatted.en: Carbon intensity drops below [[threshold]] gCO₂/kWh

hint.en: Triggers when grid carbon intensity falls below your threshold — a good time to use power.
Triggers when grid carbon intensity moves between very low / low / moderate / high / very high.
Triggers when fresh half-hourly prices become available (typically ~16:00) — schedule tonight's automations.
Triggers when the cheaper Economy 7 night rate period begins.
Triggers when the Economy 7 night rate period ends and the day rate resumes.
Triggers each half hour when the export unit rate changes.

titleFormatted.en: The export rate rises above [[price]] p/kWh

hint.en: Triggers when the export rate climbs above your threshold — a good time to discharge a battery.
Triggers when the gas unit rate changes.

titleFormatted.en: The gas price drops below [[price]] p/kWh

hint.en: Triggers when the gas unit rate crosses below your threshold.

title.en: The account balance !{{is below|is not below}} ...

titleFormatted.en: The balance of [[device]] !{{is below|is not below}} £[[amount]]

hint.en: Whether Intelligent Octopus Go is currently running a smart-charge dispatch.

titleFormatted.en: Current price !{{is below|is not below}} [[price]] p/kWh
Now !{{is|is not}} the cheapest half-hour in the next [[hours]] h
The price level !{{is|is not}} [[level]]

title.en: Now !{{is|is not}} within the cheapest period

titleFormatted.en: Now !{{is|is not}} within the cheapest [[duration]] h block of the next [[within]] h

title.en: Now !{{is|is not}} in the cheapest charge plan

titleFormatted.en: Now !{{is|is not}} in the cheapest [[duration]] h before [[by]]
Carbon intensity !{{is below|is not below}} [[intensity]] gCO₂/kWh
Now !{{is|is not}} the greenest half-hour in the next [[hours]] h
The carbon level !{{is|is not}} [[level]]
Renewable generation !{{is above|is not above}} [[percent]]%

hint.en: Wind + solar + hydro share of generation. Run loads when the grid is greenest.

title.en: Now !{{is|is not}} a good time to use power

titleFormatted.en: Now !{{is|is not}} below [[max_price]] p/kWh and [[max_carbon]] gCO₂/kWh
Price !{{is|is not}} in the cheapest [[percent]]% of the next [[hours]] h

hint.en: A relative target — adapts as the market moves, unlike a fixed p/kWh threshold.

title.en: Now !{{is|is not}} the Economy 7 night rate

hint.en: True when an Economy 7 meter is on its cheaper night register (per the configured night window).

titleFormatted.en: The relative price band !{{is|is not}} [[band]]

hint.en: Compares the current price to the whole local tariff day (duration-weighted). False until the day is fully published.

title.en: Now !{{is|is not}} the best time to export

titleFormatted.en: Now !{{is|is not}} within the highest-priced [[duration]] h of the next [[within]] h
Gas price !{{is below|is not below}} [[price]] p/kWh

hint.en: Immediately refresh prices, usage and balance from Octopus Energy.
Triggers an immediate Intelligent Octopus Go boost charge. Experimental and only works on IOG with a supported charger.

titleFormatted.en: Find the cheapest [[duration]] h slot in the next [[within]] h

hint.en: Returns the start time and average price of the cheapest block of half-hours ahead.

title.en: Plan the cheapest hours before a time

titleFormatted.en: Plan the cheapest [[duration]] h before [[by]]

hint.en: Selects the cheapest (non-contiguous) half-hours between now and the given time.

titleFormatted.en: Plan charging [[needed_kwh]] kWh at [[charge_rate]] kW before [[by]]

hint.en: Picks the cheapest half-hours before the deadline to deliver the energy you need.

titleFormatted.en: Plan greenest charge of [[needed_kwh]] kWh at [[charge_rate]] kW before [[by]] at greenness [[greenness]]

hint.en: Picks half-hours that balance low price and low carbon. Greenness 0 = cheapest, 1 = greenest.

titleFormatted.en: Compare my tariff over the last [[days]] days

hint.en: Estimates the cheapest Octopus product for your usage and the annual saving versus your current tariff.

titleFormatted.en: Find the cheapest [[duration]] h slot in the next [[within]] h, ties [[tie_strategy]] (seed [[random_seed]])

hint.en: Cheapest contiguous block with an explicit tie strategy. Prices are tariff estimates, never a settled bill; negative prices are preserved.

example.en: Estimated plan — not a settled bill

titleFormatted.en: Plan [[needed_kwh]] kWh at [[charge_rate]] kW before [[by]], ties [[tie_strategy]] (seed [[random_seed]])

hint.en: Cheapest half-hours to deliver the energy, with estimated saving vs a uniform-window baseline. Estimate only, not a bill.

example.en: Estimated vs uniform-window baseline — not a settled bill

titleFormatted.en: Analyse [[day]]'s relative prices

hint.en: Relative price bands over the whole local tariff day (declared window, duration-weighted, negatives preserved). Fails until the day is fully published.

example.en: Relative to the stated local-day window — tariff prices, not settled

title.en: Find the best time to export

titleFormatted.en: Find the highest-priced [[duration]] h export slot in the next [[within]] h

hint.en: Returns the start time and average price of the most expensive upcoming export block — the best time to sell.

titleFormatted.en: Find the best [[duration]] h export slot in the next [[within]] h, ties [[tie_strategy]] (seed [[random_seed]])

hint.en: Highest-value contiguous export block with an explicit tie strategy. Export values are estimates and may be negative; never a settled payment.

example.en: Estimated plan — not a settled bill

titleFormatted.en: Plan exporting [[export_kwh]] kWh at [[discharge_rate]] kW before [[by]], ties [[tie_strategy]] (seed [[random_seed]])

hint.en: Highest-value half-hours to export the energy, with estimated uplift vs a uniform-window baseline. Estimate only; values may be negative.

example.en: Estimated vs uniform-window baseline — not a settled bill

hint.en: How often to refresh prices, usage and balance. Prices update once per half hour.
Whether displayed unit rates and standing charges include 5% VAT.
At or below this unit rate the price level is considered cheap.
At or above this unit rate the price level is considered expensive.

Off by default. Tick this if you have an Octopus Home Mini to show near real-time power (W); it adds a Power capability. Live power is shared and rate-limited to protect your Octopus API allowance (cadence is configurable in the app settings). Leave off if you have no Home Mini.
How many hours of cheapest slots the 'Smart charge window' capability should select.
Find the cheapest slots between now and this time each day (24-hour clock).
Only include slots at or below this price in the smart-charge window. 0 = no cap.
For Economy 7 meters: when the cheaper night rate begins (local time).
For Economy 7 meters: when the night rate ends and the day rate resumes.
Regional carbon uses your tariff's grid region (recommended). National averages the whole of GB.
How often to refresh export prices, exported energy and balance.
How often to refresh prices, usage and balance.
Smart (SMETS2) gas meters usually report cubic metres; older meters may report kWh.
Volume-to-energy factor from your bill (calorific value × 1.02264 ÷ 3.6). Typically ~11.19.
How many of the day's cheapest half-hours to highlight as the best times to use power.
